{{CargoOrgan
|name=Raging Spine
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10963
|idx=156
|description=Backbone from ferocious koi-dragon mutant. So saturated with dragon essence that this dead bone still radiates menace - like it might suddenly whip you!
|skill=
|hp=2340
|def=230
|atk=318
|rush=288
|gene1=Per Dragon Form Tier, {race} ATK +35
Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene2=Water DMG +120
|gene3=Water RES +120
|gene4=Ignore Water RES +120
|gene5={race} Water RES +2%
|gene6=Water DMG +2%
|gene7=Water DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
